event: Coastal rocks with fishing boats at sea
description: A vivid coastal scene dominated by large, colorful rocky outcrops in the foreground, painted in warm tones of gold, red, pink, and brown. Waves lap at the base of the rocks. Beyond them, a calm blue-green sea stretches to distant hills on the horizon. Several small sailing vessels with dark sails are visible on the water. The painting uses bold, expressive brushwork with rich impasto texture on the rocks.
